---
title: "Docker"
description: "Build templates with Docker or Docker Compose installed."
---

# Docker

Use this pattern when the sandbox itself needs to run Docker containers.

## Docker template

```go
package main

import e2b "github.com/superduck-ai/e2b-go-sdk"

var dockerTemplate = e2b.Template(nil).
	FromUbuntuImage("24.04").
	RunCmd("curl -fsSL https://get.docker.com | sh", &struct{ User string }{User: "root"}).
	RunCmd("usermod -aG docker user", &struct{ User string }{User: "root"}).
	RunCmd("docker run --rm hello-world", &struct{ User string }{User: "root"})
```

## Build the Docker template

```go
package main

import (
	"context"
	"log"

	e2b "github.com/superduck-ai/e2b-go-sdk"
)

func main() {
	buildInfo, err := e2b.Build(context.Background(), dockerTemplate, "docker", &e2b.BuildOptions{
		BasicBuildOptions: e2b.BasicBuildOptions{
			CpuCount:    2,
			MemoryMB:    2048,
			OnBuildLogs: e2b.DefaultBuildLogger(),
		},
	})
	if err != nil {
		log.Fatal(err)
	}

	log.Println(buildInfo.TemplateID)
}
```

## Run Docker inside the sandbox

```go
package main

import (
	"context"
	"log"

	e2b "github.com/superduck-ai/e2b-go-sdk"
)

func main() {
	ctx := context.Background()

	sandbox, err := e2b.Create(ctx, "docker", nil)
	if err != nil {
		log.Fatal(err)
	}
	defer sandbox.Kill(context.Background(), nil)

	execution, err := sandbox.Commands.Run(ctx, `docker run --rm alpine echo "Hello from Alpine!"`, nil)
	if err != nil {
		log.Fatal(err)
	}

	log.Println(execution.(*e2b.CommandResult).Stdout)
}
```

## Docker Compose template

```go
package main

import e2b "github.com/superduck-ai/e2b-go-sdk"

var composeTemplate = e2b.Template(nil).
	FromUbuntuImage("24.04").
	RunCmd([]string{
		"set -euxo pipefail",
		"apt-get update",
		"DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y docker.io",
		"usermod -aG docker user",
		"DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y docker-compose-plugin || true",
		"DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y docker-compose-v2 || true",
		"DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y docker-compose || true",
		"docker compose version || docker-compose --version",
	}, &struct{ User string }{User: "root"})
```

## Run Docker Compose inside the sandbox

```go
package main

import (
	"context"
	"log"

	e2b "github.com/superduck-ai/e2b-go-sdk"
)

func main() {
	ctx := context.Background()

	sandbox, err := e2b.Create(ctx, "docker-compose", nil)
	if err != nil {
		log.Fatal(err)
	}
	defer sandbox.Kill(context.Background(), nil)

	_, err = sandbox.Files.Write(ctx, "/tmp/docker-compose-test/compose.yaml", `services:
  hello:
    image: busybox:1.36
    command: ["sh", "-lc", "echo docker-compose-ok"]
`, nil)
	if err != nil {
		log.Fatal(err)
	}

	execution, err := sandbox.Commands.Run(ctx, `
set -euxo pipefail
cd /tmp/docker-compose-test

if docker compose version >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  docker compose up --abort-on-container-exit --remove-orphans
  docker compose down --remove-orphans -v
elif docker-compose --version >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  docker-compose up --abort-on-container-exit --remove-orphans
  docker-compose down --remove-orphans -v
else
  echo "No compose command available"
  exit 127
fi
`, nil)
	if err != nil {
		log.Fatal(err)
	}

	log.Println(execution.(*e2b.CommandResult).Stdout)
}
```
